positive: Minimalist abstract woodland silhouette of a whimsical fox and forest elements. The scene features stylized birch trees, overlapping geometric forest shapes, and soft, playful fauna outlines. Color palette is limited to deep indigo, burnt orange, sage green, and creamy white ink on a neutral background. Highly contrasted line art, clean vector style, perfect for apparel transfer, central composition, symmetrical balance, illustration aesthetic, crisp edges, negative space emphasis.
